mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.user_id AS userId, r.place_id AS placeId, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS userNickname FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (user_id, place_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{placeId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content} WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) FROM reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT review_id AS reviewId, user_id AS userId, place_id AS placeId, rating, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.user_id AS userId, r.place_id AS placeId, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, p.name AS placeName FROM reviews r JOIN places p ON r.place_id = p.place_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId}
